metadata.description: Key player injury and availability tracker for World Cup 2026
metadata.notes: Data sourced from verified sports news outlets and Transfermarkt. Availability statuses: fit, minor_concern, doubt, major_doubt, injured, long_term_injured, retired_international

players.source: FOX Sports, World Soccer Talk - March 2026
players.notes: Knee injury declared 'all gone' on March 24. One goal from France all-time record.
Midfield anchor for France. Has had minor ankle issues in the past but currently fit and playing regularly for Real Madrid.

players.expectedReturn: April 2026 - expected fit for World Cup
players.notes: Left ankle injury sustained in Carabao Cup final. Expected to recover in time for World Cup.
France's first-choice goalkeeper. Had a wrist injury earlier in the season but fully recovered and playing regularly.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Left match in tears with less than 10 minutes on clock

players.source: beIN Sports, Goal.com, FOX Sports, GB News - Feb 18, 2026
players.notes: Injury worse than first feared. Will miss England's final pre-WC camp. Tuchel described it as 'a race against time'. England opens WC vs Croatia June 17.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Limped off in second half, collision with Santiago Bueno

players.notes: Minor knock, expected available for Tottenham derby. No significant injury concern for World Cup.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Played vs Uruguay (1-1 D), sat out Japan friendly as precaution

players.notes: Minor knock from Uruguay friendly. Sat out Japan match (0-1 L) as precaution. Expected fully fit for World Cup. Pattern of minor niggles but consistently returns.

players.expectedReturn: TBD - race against time for World Cup

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Suffered significant muscle strain during match

players.source: England Football, BBC Sport, Sky Sports - Mar 2026
players.notes: Significant muscle strain suffered vs Uruguay Mar 27. Missed Japan friendly. Timeline uncertain. Key creative force for England whose absence would be a major blow.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Last match before 10th career hamstring injury

players.notes: 10th career hamstring injury. Chronic recurring issue that has plagued his career. Major doubt for World Cup selection given the pattern of re-injury.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Last match before knee issue emerged

players.notes: Knee injury sustained in training. Under assessment. Adds to England's attacking injury concerns alongside Foden.
England's midfield engine. No significant injury concerns. Consistent performer for Arsenal.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Confirmed out for approximately one month

players.source: ESPN, FOX Sports, beIN Sports, Tribuna.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Expected to return by end of February. Should be fit for Finalissima. History of recurring injuries but positive recovery.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Back to near-best form after radiofrequency treatment

players.source: ESPN, Football-Espana, World Soccer Talk - Feb 2026
players.notes: Issue 'practically gone' since November after radiofrequency intervention. Overuse injury that needs ongoing management. Expected fit for WC.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Suffered injury at end of match

players.source: Sky Sports, Arsenal.com, Daily Cannon, Tribuna.com - Mar 2026
players.notes: Fractured foot surgery Feb 9, 2026. Recovery ongoing. Would need to be fit by late May for squad selection. Still a doubt but progressing.

players.injuryType: Inner meniscus tear (arthroscopy, same knee as Nov 2023 injury)
players.source: beIN Sports, Goal.com, Football-Espana, Tribuna.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Returned to group training Feb 2026 for first time in 5 months. Barcelona targeting March 15 return vs Sevilla. Coach Flick won't rush him. Gavi dreaming of World Cup selection.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: STARTED match - back from ACL! Spain won 3-0.

players.source: Manchester City, ESPN, BBC Sport - Mar 2026
players.notes: 2024 Ballon d'Or winner. Returned from ACL tear ahead of schedule. Started vs Serbia (3-0 W) on Mar 27. Massive boost for Spain's World Cup campaign.
Returning from long-term injury. Fitness still being managed carefully. A doubt for full World Cup involvement.

players.injuryType: ACL tear - OUT of World Cup
players.notes: ACL tear rules him out of the World Cup entirely. Was emerging as a genuine squad option for Spain. Devastating blow for the young striker.

players.injuryType: Fractured fibula + dislocated ankle (Club World Cup 2025)
players.expectedReturn: Race against time for World Cup

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Getting minutes but still not at full match fitness after devastating injury

players.notes: Fractured fibula and dislocated ankle in Club World Cup 2025 QF vs PSG. Returned Jan 2026 but still racing against time to regain full match sharpness. Germany's World Cup hopes hinge on his fitness. Not yet back to his best.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Sensational performance: 2 goals, 2 assists in 4-3 win

players.notes: In sensational form. 2 goals and 2 assists vs Switzerland (4-3 W). Germany's talisman and key creative force. No injury concerns whatsoever.
Germany captain. Versatile player (midfield/right-back). No current injury concerns. Leader of the squad.
Reinvented himself as a center-forward at Arsenal. No injury concerns. Key goal threat for Germany.
Experienced center-back. No current injury concerns. Defensive leader for Germany.
9 goals, 5 assists in La Liga 2025/26. Strong form with goals in 3 consecutive matches. Expected to be Brazil's star player at the World Cup.

players.injuryType: Knee surgery (chronic knee problem, previous ACL tear)
players.notes: Age 34. Underwent knee surgery Dec 2025 following previous ACL tear. Fresh disciplinary setback (Apr 5), Santos recovery plan announced (Apr 7), manager Ancelotti cautiously optimistic about progress (Apr 11), reported to be in advanced MLS talks with FC Cincinnati post-World Cup (Apr 12). Has not played for Brazil since October 2023. Ancelotti said he must be '100%, not 80%' to make squad. Race against time.
Versatile attacker for Real Madrid. No injury concerns. Important creative option for Brazil.
Brazil's defensive leader and captain. No current injury concerns. Experienced in major tournaments.
World-class goalkeeper. Has had recurring hamstring problems this season. Liverpool managing his minutes carefully. Expected fit for World Cup.
Age 38, turning 39 mid-tournament. Fully recovered from hamstring strain. World Cup participation still his personal decision per Scaloni. Likely final World Cup.
Hero of 2022 World Cup final. No injury concerns. Undisputed starting goalkeeper for Argentina.
Young striker excelling at Atletico Madrid. No injury concerns. Likely to lead Argentina's attack if Messi is unavailable.
Midfield engine and 'Messi's bodyguard'. No injury concerns. Tireless worker essential to Argentina's system.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Suffered knee ligament tear, ruled out for 8+ months

players.notes: Young talent ruled out of World Cup with knee ligament tear requiring 8+ months recovery. Major blow for Argentina's depth.
Ruled out of World Cup with ruptured Achilles tendon. Devastating blow for Argentina's defensive options.

players.expectedReturn: Uncertain - race against time for World Cup

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Suffered cruciate ligament tear during match

players.notes: Starting center-back and defensive enforcer. Cruciate ligament tear is a devastating blow. Race against time to be fit for World Cup. Major doubt for Argentina's backline.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Limped off 81st minute with muscle discomfort, missed penalty earlier

players.source: SportBible, Tribuna.com, GB News, Goal.com - Mar 1, 2026
players.notes: Age 41. Forced off with hamstring concern during 3-1 win. Al Nassr boss Jorge Jesus said it was precautionary. Medical tests ongoing. Expected fit for World Cup even in worst case (3-5 weeks). Would be record 6th World Cup.
Portugal's creative hub. No injury concerns. Consistently one of the most durable players in the Premier League.
Tireless midfielder with exceptional technical ability. No injury concerns. Key player for Portugal's midfield.
Explosive winger. No injury concerns. Important attacking option for Portugal.
World-class center-back. No current injury concerns. Defensive leader for Portugal.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Returned to full action. Multiple starts for Napoli since March 6.

players.notes: Age 34. Returned to Napoli action March 6 after thigh tear. Multiple starts since. Back to full fitness and available for Belgium. Captain and creative fulcrum.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Absent from March international camp due to fitness issues

players.notes: Belgium's all-time top scorer. Absent from March international camp with fitness issues. Availability for World Cup to be monitored.
Hip injury keeping him out. Doubt for World Cup. Versatile attacker who provides depth across the frontline for Belgium.
Explosive young winger. No significant injury concerns. Key attacking threat for Belgium.
Has fully recovered from 2023 ACL tear. Playing regularly as Real Madrid's number one. Expected to be Belgium's starting goalkeeper.
Netherlands captain and defensive leader. No injury concerns. One of the best center-backs in the world.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Played full 90 minutes in each of last 4 appearances

players.notes: Moved to Tottenham Aug 2025 for ~51.8M. Had minor ankle swelling and a suspension (red card vs Liverpool) but no injury concerns. Key attacking player for Netherlands.
Versatile forward in excellent form for Liverpool. No injury concerns. Key attacking option for Netherlands.
Starting center-back alongside Van Dijk. No current injury concerns. Experienced at the highest level.

players.injuryType: Withdrew from March squad — injury-hit season
players.expectedReturn: Expected available but fitness a concern
players.source: Country Scout intel, club reports - April 2026
players.notes: Withdrew from Netherlands' March 2026 squad. Has had an injury-hit season at Manchester United. Should be available for World Cup but fitness needs monitoring.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Pulled out with recurring ankle issue

players.notes: Has battled chronic ankle issues since 2023. Missed significant time this season. When fit, a key midfielder for Netherlands. Fitness remains the main concern for World Cup.

players.injuryType: Shoulder injury (sustained vs Italy playoff, March 31)
players.expectedReturn: Mid-May 2026 (~5-6 week recovery, no surgery required)

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Sustained shoulder injury during match; Bosnia won on penalties

players.notes: Veteran striker, age 40. Shoulder injury sustained in playoff final vs Italy on March 31. No surgery required, estimated 5-6 week recovery. Bosnia's all-time top scorer and captain. Age compounds recovery concerns.
Key striker alongside Dzeko. No injury concerns. Important goal threat for Bosnia.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Final international appearance before retirement announcement

players.notes: Announced retirement from international football in December 2025. Significant creative loss for Bosnia's midfield. Still playing at club level with CSKA Moscow.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Scored match-winning goal in 1-2 away victory

players.notes: Age 40. 5th World Cup. Joined AC Milan from Real Madrid. Winning the World Cup is his final goal before retirement. Performing well in Serie A.
Dealing with fitness hurdles but nearing full return. Important part of Croatia's golden generation midfield. Expected available for World Cup.

Suffered a tibial fracture in January 2026. Targeting mid-May return which would leave minimal preparation time before the World Cup. Major doubt. Croatia's most important defender alongside Modric as the team's key player.
Croatia's first-choice goalkeeper. Hero of 2022 World Cup penalty shootouts. No injury concerns.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Third injury of 2025-26 season. Currently dealing with bursitis near hip.

players.source: ESPN, World Soccer Talk, SI.com - Feb 2026
players.notes: Zero goals in 2026. Bursitis near hip. Pochettino concerned about availability. When fit, 'undroppable' for USMNT. USA are co-hosts, opening June 11.
Versatile midfielder playing in Serie A. No significant injury concerns. Important box-to-box presence for USMNT.
USMNT captain candidate. Has a history of back and hamstring injuries. Currently fit but workload carefully managed. Key leader for the home World Cup.
Son of USMNT legend Claudio Reyna. Hugely talented but injury-prone. Currently fit and building confidence. Could be key creative spark for USMNT.
Dynamic left-back nicknamed 'Jedi'. No injury concerns. One of the Premier League's most dynamic fullbacks.

players.injuryType: Ankle surgery recovery — absent from recent matches
players.expectedReturn: TBD - absent from recent international squads

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Has returned to club duty but absent from recent Mexico squads

players.source: Country Scout intel, SI.com, vivaligamx.com - April 2026
players.notes: Mexico's star striker. Returned from ankle surgery but absent from recent international squads. Fitness for World Cup uncertain. Critical player if available.

players.expectedReturn: TBD - fitness for World Cup uncertain

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Limited appearances in 2026 due to ankle issues

players.source: Country Scout intel, SI.com, vivaligamx.com, Turkish media - April 2026
players.notes: Mexico captain. Battling ankle discomfort since December. Fitness for World Cup uncertain. If unavailable, it would be a massive blow to Mexico's midfield structure.

players.injuryType: No current injury — reportedly choosing MLS over World Cup
players.source: Country Scout intel, ESPN, Mexican media - April 2026
players.notes: Known as 'Chucky'. Reports indicate Lozano is CHOOSING MLS COMMITMENTS OVER WORLD CUP. If true, a shocking loss for Mexico. Moved to San Diego FC as marquee signing.

players.expectedReturn: OUT - ruled out of World Cup
players.source: Country Scout intel, Mexican media - April 2026
players.notes: Ruptured Achilles rules him out of the 2026 World Cup. Was Mexico's first-choice goalkeeper. Devastating blow to Mexico's goalkeeping depth.

players.expectedReturn: OUT - ruled out of World Cup

players.notes: Torn ACL rules him out of the 2026 World Cup. Was an emerging midfield talent for Mexico. Significant loss to squad depth.

players.expectedReturn: OUT - ruled out of World Cup
players.source: Country Scout intel, Mexican media - April 2026
players.notes: Fractured ankle rules him out of the 2026 World Cup. Another blow to Mexico's already depleted midfield options.
Age 40. Legendary goalkeeper competing for 6th World Cup. No injury concerns. Emotional leader of Mexico squad.
Experienced striker. Has overcome serious skull fracture in 2020. No current injury concerns. Important veteran presence.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Hamstring strain March 11, returned to training

players.notes: Hamstring strain March 11 but has returned to training. Expected fit for World Cup in June. Canada's superstar and most important player. Co-hosts need him healthy.
Fully recovered and now scoring for Juventus in Serie A. Canada's all-time leading scorer and talisman. Fit and in form ahead of World Cup.
Young center-back with a broken leg. No firm return timeline. Another defensive blow for Canada.
Starting right-back for Canada. Hamstring injury with no firm timeline. Another injury in Canada's mounting list of concerns.
Blood clot recovery at LAFC. Availability uncertain. Key creative midfielder for Canada.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Starting regularly, fully recovered from broken tibia

players.notes: Fully recovered from broken leg suffered during Copa America 2024. Starting for Villarreal in La Liga. Key attacking weapon for Canada.

players.source: Korea Herald, Korea Times, Country Scout intel - April 2026
players.notes: Age 33. Moved to LAFC from Tottenham ($26.5M MLS record transfer, Aug 2025). Foot issue being managed. Coach managing captain's workload carefully ahead of what is likely his final World Cup.
World-class center-back at Bayern Munich. No injury concerns. South Korea's defensive anchor.

players.expectedReturn: Available but match sharpness a concern

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Reduced club playing time — rotation and competition for places

players.notes: Not injured but reduced playing time at PSG is a concern for match sharpness heading into the World Cup. Still South Korea's most technically gifted player.
Versatile forward playing in the Premier League. No injury concerns. Important attacking option.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Suffered muscle strain, missed March international friendlies

players.notes: Age 33. Muscle strain vs Galatasaray Mar 18 forced him to miss both March friendlies (Saudi Arabia 4-0 W, Spain 0-0 D). Egypt won both WITHOUT Salah. Expected fit for World Cup.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Played full match in impressive 0-0 draw

players.notes: Emerged as Egypt's co-star alongside Salah. Manchester City forward in superb form. Led the line in both March friendlies without Salah, proving Egypt can compete at the highest level.
Experienced midfielder. No injury concerns. Veteran presence in Egypt's squad.
Key center-back for Egypt. No injury concerns. Strong in domestic competition.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Came off at half-time with niggles, rested vs Salford

players.source: SI.com, Sports Mole, Manchester City - Feb 2026
players.notes: Norway qualified for first WC since 1998 with perfect 8-0 record. Haaland scored 16 goals in qualifying. 'Fully fit' per Guardiola.
Arsenal captain and Norway's creative star. Fully recovered from 2024 ankle injury. In excellent form. Key partnership with Haaland for Norway.
Powerful striker. No injury concerns. Important backup/partner for Haaland in attack.
Colombia's star winger. Moved to Bayern Munich. Ranked 15th among 100 best players for 2026 World Cup by NYT. No injury concerns.
Age 34. Golden Boot winner 2014 World Cup. 122 caps. Hospitalized for dehydration in Apr 2026 but recovered; expected fit for World Cup. Workload management needed. Veteran leader for Colombia.
No physical injury but federation relationship strained due to off-field issues. Major doubt for World Cup selection despite talent. Situation being monitored.
Defensive midfielder playing in the Premier League. No injury concerns. Key to Colombia's midfield balance.
World-class midfielder. No injury concerns. Uruguay's most important player at the World Cup.
Explosive striker. No injury concerns. Key goal threat for Uruguay.
Had a serious hamstring tear earlier in the season. Has returned to action. Being managed carefully. Uruguay's best defender when fit.
Age 39. Still contributing in MLS. Unlikely to be first-choice but could be part of the squad for experience. Workload management essential.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Scored the winner in historic 1-0 victory at Wembley

players.notes: Fully fit and in outstanding form. Scored the winner in Japan's historic first-ever victory over England at Wembley (March 2026). Key attacking threat.

players.expectedReturn: N/A - not injured but squad inclusion uncertain
players.notes: Not injured but dropped from recent squads due to lack of match sharpness. Squad inclusion for World Cup is not guaranteed despite his quality.
2022 World Cup hero. No injury concerns. Morocco's first-choice goalkeeper.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Has had an injury-hit season with limited appearances

Senegal's star player. No injury concerns. Key to Senegal's World Cup campaign.
Age 35. Experienced defender. Playing in Saudi league. Fitness management needed but no specific injury.

Switzerland captain and leader. No injury concerns. Consistently one of the best midfielders in the Bundesliga.
Veteran goalkeeper. No injury concerns. Switzerland's reliable number one.

players.injuryType: Previous ACL injuries (history of knee problems)
players.notes: Has a history of serious knee injuries including two ACL tears. Currently fit and playing but always a concern given his injury history.
Box-to-box midfielder. No injury concerns. Key player for Czechia with Premier League experience. Stripped of captaincy under new coach Koubek; Ladislav Krejci named new captain.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Limited minutes due to calf issue

players.notes: Recurring calf injury is a concern. Key attacking talent for Czechia. Fitness being closely monitored ahead of World Cup.
Experienced striker with Euro 2020 pedigree. Recurring calf issues a concern. Expected fit for World Cup barring setback.

Socceroos captain. No injury concerns. Key midfield leader.

lastMatchPlayed.notes: Expelled by Iranian government from national team

players.notes: EXPELLED by Iranian government from national team (political reasons, not injury). Massive loss: 57 goals in 91 caps. Iran loses their second-highest scorer and key attacking partner to Taremi. Still playing at club level with AS Roma.
2023 Asian Cup Golden Ball winner. No injury concerns. Qatar's star player.
All-time top scorer for Qatar. No injury concerns. Key striker.
Age 35. Qatar's most capped player and captain. Fitness management needed. Veteran leader.

players.notes: Recurring muscle fatigue throughout Brighton season. Being carefully managed. Expected fit for World Cup but workload needs monitoring.
World-class defensive midfielder. No injury concerns. Ecuador's most valuable player.

Versatile attacker with Premier League quality. No injury concerns. Key creative player for Sweden.

players.expectedReturn: Expected back before World Cup - recovery ongoing
players.notes: Fractured fibula in December 2025. Expected to return before the World Cup but remains a major doubt. Key striker alongside Gyokeres. Kulusevski fit and available.
